title: Method for cannabinoid delivery into beverages
abstract: In hot beverage cannabis related products, such as single use coffee systems as well as other coffee systems, the cannabinoids are not being infused into the beverages, such as coffee, during the brewing process. To solve this problem, a cannabinoid delivery system is provided. The cannabinoid delivery system includes various systems and methods of positioning cannabinoids and/or cannabis plant matter in locations and forms such that the cannabinoids are properly infused into the beverages.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A cannabinoid delivery system for delivering cannabinoids into beverages comprising: a cannabinoid delivery system consisting of cannabis plant matter, the cannabinoid delivery system is configured to be used with a coffee machine having a coffee filter housing ground coffee, the coffee filter having a filter size and the cannabis plant matter is smaller than the filter size, the coffee machine operable to enable hot water to pass through the coffee filter, wherein the hot water is configured to be collected into a receptacle defining a beverage; and, wherein the cannabinoid delivery system is positioned in relation to the coffee machine such that the hot water also passes through the cannabinoid delivery system such that the cannabis plant matter is mixed into the beverage, wherein the cannabinoid delivery system is not configured to retain the cannabis plant matter. 2. The system of claim 1, wherein the receptacle is a coffee pot having a lid containing a compartment, wherein the cannabinoid delivery system is positioned within the compartment and the coffee machine is a drip coffee machine and the coffee pot is positioned below the coffee machine to retain the beverage. 3. The system of claim 1, wherein cannabinoid delivery system includes a filter pod and the cannabis plant matter is positioned in the filter pod. 4. The system claim 3, wherein the filter pod is dissolvable in the hot water. 5. The system of claim 1, wherein the coffee machine is an espresso machine, and the coffee filter is a portafilter basket, wherein the cannabinoid delivery system is retained in or underneath the portafilter basket. 6. The system of claim 1, wherein the cannabis plant matter is ground cannabis plant matter comprised of nanoparticles. 7. The system of claim 1, wherein the cannabis plant matter is selected from the group consisting of: cannabis oil, cannabis distillates, and a cannabis cannabinoid isolate. 8. The system of claim 1, further comprising a compartment positioned in the coffee machine, wherein the cannabinoid delivery system is positioned within the compartment. 9. The system of claim 1, wherein the cannabinoid delivery system is in the coffee filter. 10. The system of claim 1, wherein the cannabinoid delivery system is below the coffee filter. 11. The system of claim 1, wherein the ground coffee is saturated with cannabis plant matter. 12. A cannabinoid delivery system for delivering cannabinoids into beverages comprising: a single use cannabinoid delivery system configured to be used in a single-serve brewing machine, the single use cannabinoid delivery system comprising a hollow housing configured to hold a filter bag consisting of ground coffee or tea, wherein the ground coffee or tea is saturated in cannabis plant matter, wherein the filter bag has a filter size, and the cannabis plant matter is smaller than the filter size; and, wherein the single-serve brewing machine is configured to enable hot water to pass through the single use cannabinoid delivery system to extract the ground coffee or tea and dispense the cannabis plant matter into the hot water which is configured to be collected into a cup defining a beverage. 13. A cannabinoid delivery system for delivering cannabinoids into beverages comprising: a cannabinoid delivery system, the cannabinoid delivery system configured to be used in a single-serve brewing machine, the cannabinoid delivery system consisting of a hollow housing, the hollow housing having an integrated filter having a filter size, the hollow housing configured to retain a filter cannabis plant matter and ground coffee or tea, wherein the cannabis plant matter is smaller than the filter size; and, wherein the single-serve brewing machine is configured to enable hot water to pass through the cannabinoid delivery system to extract the ground coffee or tea and 

 dispense the cannabis plant matter into the hot water which is configured to be collected into a cup defining a beverage. 14. A cannabinoid delivery system for delivering cannabinoids into beverages comprising: a single use cannabinoid delivery system configured to be used in a single-serve brewing machine, the single use cannabinoid delivery system comprising a hollow housing configured to hold a filter bag consisting of cannabis plant matter and ground coffee or tea, wherein the filter bag has a filter size, and the cannabis plant matter is smaller than the filter size; and, wherein the single-serve brewing machine is configured to enable hot water to pass through the single use cannabinoid delivery system to extract the ground coffee or tea and dispense the cannabis plant matter into the hot water which is configured to be collected into a cup defining a beverage. 15. The system of claim 14, wherein the cannabis plant matter is ground cannabis plant matter having a particle size. 16. The system of claim 14, wherein the filter size is approximately 20 micrometers and the particle size is less than 10 micrometers. 17. The system of claim 14, wherein the cannabis plant matter is encapsulated nanoparticles configured to be water soluble. 18. A system for cannabinoid delivery into beverages comprising: a single use cannabinoid delivery system configured to be used in a single-serve brewing machine, the single use cannabinoid delivery system comprising a hollow housing configured to retain a filter bag and cannabis plant matter, wherein the filter bag consisting of ground coffee or tea, and the cannabis plant matter is positioned below or above the filter bag, wherein the filter bag has a filter size, and the cannabis plant matter is smaller than the filter size; and, wherein the single-serve brewing machine is configured to enable hot water to pass through the single use cannabinoid delivery system to extract the ground coffee or tea and dispense the cannabis plant matter into the hot water which is configured to be collected into a cup defining a beverage.
